properties.description: Know number names and the count sequence.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Count to tell the number of objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Compare numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand addition as putting together and adding to, and understand subtraction as taking apart and taking from.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Identify and describe shapes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze, compare, create, and compose shapes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Describe and compare measurable attributes of length and weight of everyday objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Classify objects and count the number of objects in each category.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Know number names and write and recite the count sequence.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply one-to-one correspondence to count the number of objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply the concept of magnitude to compare numbers and quantities.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place value to compose and decompose numbers within 19.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the concepts of putting together and taking apart to add and subtract within 10.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Identify and describe two- and three- dimensional shapes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze, compare, create, and compose two- and three-dimensional shapes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Describe and compare attributes of length, area, weight, and capacity of everyday objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Classify objects and count the number of objects in each category.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the counting sequence to read and write numerals to represent objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value concepts to represent amounts of tens and ones and to compare two digit numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value concepts and properties of operations to add and subtract within 100.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and solve problems involving addition and subtraction within 20.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand and apply properties of operations and the relationship between addition and subtraction.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Compose and distinguish between two- and three- dimensional shapes based on their attributes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the understanding of fractions to partition shapes into halves and quarters.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Order lengths and measure them both indirectly and by repeating length units.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Tell and write time to the nearest half hour using both analog and digital clocks.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and interpret data using tables/charts.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value concepts to represent amounts of tens and ones and to compare three digit numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value concepts to read, write, and skip count to 1000.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value understanding and properties of operations to add and subtract within 1000.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and solve problems involving addition and subtraction within 100.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use mental strategies to add and subtract within 20.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Work with equal groups of objects to gain foundations for multiplication.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze and draw two- and three-dimensional shapes having specified attributes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the understanding of fractions to partition shapes into halves, quarters, and thirds.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Measure and estimate lengths in standard units using appropriate tools.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Tell and write time to the nearest five minutes using both analog and digital clocks.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems and make change using coins and paper currency with appropriate symbols.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and interpret data using line plots, picture graphs, and bar graphs.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the concepts of addition and subtraction to problems involving length.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply place-value understanding and properties of operations to perform multi-digit arithmetic.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Explore and develop an understanding of fractions as numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and solve problems involving multiplication and division.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand properties of multiplication and the relationship between multiplication and division.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Demonstrate multiplication and division fluency.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems involving the four operations, and identify and explain patterns in arithmetic.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Identify, compare, and classify shapes and their attributes.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the understanding of fractions to partition shapes into parts with equal areas and express the area of each part as a unit fraction of the whole.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems involving measurement and estimation of temperature, liquid volume, mass, and length.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Tell and write time to the nearest minute and solve problems by calculating time intervals.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems and make change involving money using a combination of coins and bills.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and interpret data using tally charts, tables, pictographs, line plots, and bar graphs.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Determine the area of a rectangle and apply the concept to multiplication and to addition.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems involving perimeters of polygons and distinguish between linear and area measures.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply place-value concepts to show an understanding of multi-digit whole numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use place-value understanding and properties of operations to perform multi-digit arithmetic.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the understanding of fractions to show equivalence and ordering.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Build fractions from unit fractions by applying and extending previous understandings of operations on whole numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Connect decimal notation to fractions, and compare decimal fractions (base 10 denominator, e.g., 19/100).
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and solve problems involving the four operations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Develop and/or apply number theory concepts to find factors and multiples.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Generate and analyze patterns using one rule.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Draw lines and angles and identify these in two-dimensional figures.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Classify two-dimensional figures by properties of their lines and angles.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Recognize symmetric shapes and draw lines of symmetry.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems involving measurement and conversions from a larger unit to a smaller unit.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Translate information from one type of data display to another.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and interpret data involving fractions using information provided in a line plot.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Measure angles and use properties of adjacent angles to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply place-value concepts to show an understanding of operations and rounding as they pertain to whole numbers and decimals.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend an understanding of operations with whole numbers to perform operations including decimals.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the understanding of equivalency to add and subtract fractions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend previous understandings of multiplication and division to multiply and divide fractions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Interpret and evaluate numerical expressions using order of operations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze patterns and relationships using two rules.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Graph points in the first quadrant on the coordinate plane and interpret these points when solving real world and mathematical problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Classify two-dimensional figures into categories based on an understanding of their properties.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems using conversions within a given measurement system.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and interpret data using appropriate scale.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve problems involving computation of fractions using information provided in a line plot.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply concepts of volume to solve problems and relate volume to multiplication and to addition.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand ratio concepts and use ratio reasoning to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend previous understandings of multiplication and division to divide fractions by fractions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Identify and choose appropriate processes to compute fluently with multi-digit numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Develop and/or apply number theory concepts to find common factors and multiples.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend previous understandings of numbers to the system of rational numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend previous understandings of arithmetic to algebraic expressions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand the process of solving a one-variable equation or inequality and apply it to real-world and mathematical problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent and analyze quantitative relationships between dependent and independent variables.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply appropriate tools to solve real-world and mathematical problems involving area, surface area, and volume.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Demonstrate an understanding of statistical variability by displaying, analyzing, and summarizing distributions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze proportional relationships and use them to model and solve real-world and mathematical problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend previous understandings of operations with fractions to operations with rational numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply properties of operations to generate equivalent expressions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Model and solve real-world and mathematical problems by using and connecting numerical, algebraic, and/or graphical representations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Solve real-world and mathematical problems involving angle measure, area, surface area, circumference, and volume.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Visualize and represent geometric figures and describe the relationships between them.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Draw inferences about populations based on random sampling concepts.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Draw informal comparative inferences about two populations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Investigate chance processes and develop, use, and evaluate probability models.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Distinguish between rational and irrational numbers using their properties.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Estimate irrational numbers by comparing them to rational numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply concepts of radicals and integer exponents to generate equivalent expressions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand the connections between proportional relationships, lines, and linear equations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze and solve linear equations and pairs of simultaneous linear equations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Define, evaluate, and compare functions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use concepts of functions to model relationships between quantities.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply the concepts of volume of cylinders, cones, and spheres to solve real-world and mathematical problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand and apply congruence, similarity, and geometric transformations using various tools.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand and apply the Pythagorean Theorem to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze and/or interpret bivariate data displayed in multiple representations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand that patterns of association can be seen in bivariate data utilizing frequencies.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply and extend the properties of exponents to solve problems with rational exponents.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply properties of rational and irrational numbers to solve real world or mathematical problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply quantitative reasoning to choose and interpret units and scales in formulas, graphs, and data displays.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use units as a way to understand problems and to guide the solution of multi-step problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Choose a level of accuracy appropriate to limitations on measurement when reporting quantities.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the knowledge of arithmetic operations and apply to complex numbers.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply concepts of complex numbers in polynomial identities and quadratic equations to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the concept and notation of functions to interpret and apply them in terms of their context.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Graph and analyze functions and use their properties to make connections between the different representations.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Write functions or sequences that model relationships between two quantities.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Interpret the effects transformations have on functions and find the inverses of functions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Construct and compare linear, quadratic, and exponential models to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Interpret functions in terms of the situations they model.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply radian measure of an angle and the unit circle to analyze the trigonometric functions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Choose trigonometric functions to model periodic phenomena and describe the properties of the graphs.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Prove the Pythagorean identity and use it to calculate trigonometric ratios.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Interpret the structure of expressions to represent a quantity in terms of its context.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Write expressions in equivalent forms to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the knowledge of arithmetic operations and apply to polynomials.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Understand the relationship between zeros and factors of polynomials to make generalizations about functions and their graphs.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use polynomial identities to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the knowledge of rational functions to rewrite in equivalent forms.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Create and graph equations or inequalities to describe numbers or relationships.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply inverse operations to solve equations or formulas for a given variable.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use reasoning to solve equations and justify the solution method.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Represent, solve, and interpret equations/inequalities and systems of equations/inequalities algebraically and graphically.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use geometric figures and their properties to represent transformations in the plane.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply rigid transformations to determine and explain congruence.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Verify and apply geometric theorems as they relate to geometric figures.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply the concept of congruence to create geometric constructions.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Create justifications based on transformations to establish similarity of plane figures.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Verify and apply theorems involving similarity as they relate to plane figures.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply trigonometric ratios to solve problems involving right triangles.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply geometric theorems to verify properties of circles.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Extend the concept of similarity to determine arc lengths and areas of sectors of circles.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Translate between the geometric description and the equation for a conic section.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply coordinate geometry to prove simple geometric theorems algebraically.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Explain volume formulas and use them to solve problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze relationships between two-dimensional and three-dimensional objects.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply geometric concepts to model and solve real world problems.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Summarize, represent, and interpret data on a single count or measurement variable.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Summarize, represent, and interpret data on two categorical and quantitative variables.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Analyze linear models to make interpretations based on the data.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Recognize and evaluate random processes underlying statistical experiments.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Make inferences and justify conclusions based on sample surveys, experiments, and observational studies.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Use the concepts of independence and conditional probability to interpret data.
properties.author: 1EdTech

properties.description: Apply the rules of probability to compute probabilities of compound events in a uniform probability model.
properties.author: 1EdTech
